agent_output.subject: [VM-ESCALATION] URGENT: EPR-2006 — SLA at Risk — Manager Action Required
agent_output.email_body:
,
 
This vulnerability has been escalated to you because apoorv.sharma@ascendion.com has not 
responded to two prior communications regarding a LOW severity 
finding. The SLA deadline is .
 
────────────────────────────────────────────────
ESCALATION CONTEXT
────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Vulnerability:        EPR-2006  (Low, CVSS 9.80)
  Asset:                srv-app-006  ()
  Owner Contacted:      apoorv.sharma@ascendion.com  (apoorv.sharma@ascendion.com)
  Manager (you):        
 
────────────────────────────────────────────────
CONTACT HISTORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────
      Initial email sent  →  No response
            Follow-up email sent  →  No response  
          ESCALATION (this email)
  Total time since first contact: h
  SLA breach status: 
 
────────────────────────────────────────────────
ACTION REQUESTED FROM MANAGER
────────────────────────────────────────────────
Please choose one of the following:
 
  1. Confirm apoorv.sharma@ascendion.com will action this within h
     Reply: STATUS: CONFIRMED_OWNER  ETA: <date>
 
  2. Reassign to another engineer on your team
     Reply: STATUS: REASSIGN  NEW_OWNER: <email>
 
  3. Request SLA extension with business justification
     Reply: STATUS: EXTENSION_REQUEST  REASON: <justification>  NEW_ETA: <date>
 
  4. Confirm this is not owned by your team
     Reply: STATUS: NOT_OUR_ASSET  SUGGESTED_OWNER: <team or email>
 
────────────────────────────────────────────────
WHAT HAPPENS NEXT
────────────────────────────────────────────────
If no response is received within h, this 
will be escalated to  (your manager) and the GCS team, 
and the ServiceNow ticket will be marked BREACHED.
 
We understand engineering teams are busy and would much rather close 
this collaboratively. A 60-second reply unblocks the process.
 
────────────────────────────────────────────────
VULNERABILITY DETAILS
────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Detection ID:    EPR-2006
  Asset Name:      srv-app-006
  Resource ID:     res-10006
  CVE ID(s):       
  First Detected:  
  Synopsis:        OpenSSL Vulnerability
  Solution:        Upgrade to the latest supported version
 
For full audit trail and reply history, see ServiceNow ticket .
 
Thank you for your prompt attention.
 
— Vulnerability Management Team
   Security Operations
   On behalf of the CISO Office
